Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at LaSalle. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier mechanical problem at LaSalle.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Perry
ShortDescription: 115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near 115th/Perry.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 115th, Wentworth, 119th, Michigan, 115th, over normal route, due to a street blockage near 115th/Perry.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #103 West 103rd Temporary Reroute near 103rd/Wallace
ShortDescription: 103 West 103rd buses temp. rerouted: due to, street blockage near 103rd/Wallace.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#103 West 103rd buses temp. rerouted: due to, street blockage near 103rd/Wallace.

Westbound buses will operate via 103rd, Normal, 102nd, Union and 103rd including the normal route streets at the beginning and end.

Eastbound buses will operate via 103rd, Union, 102nd, Parnell and 103rd.

Allow extra travel time.
